Orthodontic laboratory is an integral part of the Orthodontic clinic.

It provides laboratory studies of removable or fixed orthodontic appliances planned to be applied by orthodontic specialists according to the treatment type.

It provides the opportunity and infrastructure for the repair or renewal of broken or deformed appliances.

It is one of the supporting elements of clinical education where students can use current materials used for orthodontic treatment and develop their hand skills with the latest technology devices and instruments.
